text:
is an upcoming mobile game being released for iOS and Android devices. The originally untitled game was to be released by the end of 2016 in all major English markets.

In 2018 the game was retitled Attack on Titan: Assault, with an open beta available for download. The game is expected to combine elements of runner and action games as well as feature multi-player.

 started beta testing Attack on Titan: Assault on iOS and Android devices in Late July 2018. A trailer featuring some gameplay and in-game graphics was released on 22nd of January 2019.

The open beta game on Google Play is available for downloading for all users since 19th of March 2019.
